product_name: Eukanuba Special Care Puppy Sensitive Digestion with Chicken & Turkey
summary:
• Dry food for puppies of all breeds up to 1 year old
  • Ideal for dogs with sensitive digestion
  • Balanced recipe with chicken, turkey and rice
  • With beneficial omega fatty acids, prebiotics and calcium
description:
Eukanuba Special Care Puppy Sensitive Digestion with Chicken & Turkey offers your young dog a balanced dry food that is suitable for all breeds of puppy and is particularly easy to digest. The recipe contains chicken and turkey as digestible sources of protein, which can help to support development- and maintenance of muscle mass.
White rice acts as a well-tolerated source of carbohydrates. Eukanuba Special Care Puppy Sensitive Digestion with Chicken & Turkey provides your dog with a mix of fibre and prebiotics to help support healthy digestive function.

Eukanuba Special Care Puppy Sensitive Digestion with Chicken & Turkey at a glance:
  • Dry food for puppies and young dogs aged up to 1 year, of all breeds
  • Specially for dogs with sensitive stomachs: tailored recipe for young dogs with sensitive digestion
  • Rich in poultry: chicken and turkey as highly-digestible sources of animal protein
  • With white rice: an easy to digest source of carbohydrates
  • Supports digestion: contains a mix of prebiotics (FOS, MOS) and beet pulp, to support digestive function
  • For daily feeding: 100% complete and balanced, suitable as a complete diet
  • With beneficial omega fatty acids: contain natural sources of omega-3 and –6 fatty acids, to support healthy skin and coat
  • Contains calcium: essential for building and maintaining healthy bones
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Dried chicken and -turkey (31%, including 22% chicken), white rice, maize, fresh chicken (10%), poultry fat, dried sugar beet pulp (3.9%), chicken gravy, dried whole egg, fish meal, minerals, linseeds, fish oil, fructo-oligosaccharides (1%), dried brewers' yeast, mannan-oligosaccharides (0.13%), microencapsulated sodium butyrate (0.1%).

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives:
Vitamin A (15,000 IU), vitamin D3 (1500 IU), vitamin E (250mg), beta-carotene (5mg), L-carnitine (50mg), iron [ferrous(II)-amino acids chelate hydrate] (50mg), copper [cupric(II)-amino acids chelate hydrate] (5mg), zinc [amino acids zinc chelate hydrate] (62.5mg), manganese [amino acids manganous chelate hydrate] (10mg), iodine [calcium iodate anhydrous] (1.5mg).
Antioxidants:
Tocopherol-rich extracts from vegetable oil (26mg).
Sensory additives:
Rosemary extract.
feeding_recommendations:

Eukanuba Special Care Puppy Sensitive Digestion with Chicken & Turkey is a complete food for dogs.

A specialised diet such as this Eukanuba Special Care Weight Control Adult Small/Medium can help to support your dog in this. summary:

description:
With just a glance, you can be sure that this Eukanuba Special Care Adult Sensitive Skin provides your dog with everything it needs. The kibble has a hypoallergenic recipe and contains delicious fish as the sole source of animal protein.
This Eukanuba Special Care Adult Sensitive Skin dry dog food not only contains high-quality protein but is also enriched with beneficial omega-3 and -6 fatty acids, which contribute to healthy skin and glossy coat. Eukanuba Special Care Adult Sensitive Skin also contains a tailored mix of fibres to help support digestion. It has a special DentaDefense system with a kibble shape designed to help keep teeth clean.

Eukanuba Special Care Adult Sensitive Skin at a glance:
  • Balanced dry food for all breeds of adult dog over 1 year old
  • Ideal for sensitive dogs: especially those with skin prone to sensitivity, itching or irritation
  • Single source of animal protein: made with fish as the sole source of animal protein

  • Provides beneficial omega-3 and -6 fatty acids: to support skin and coat
  • With prebiotics: tailored mix of fibres with prebiotics and beet pulp to support digestion
  • Balanced food: complete recipe that is ideal for daily canine nutrition
  • Special kibble shape: to support dental hygiene through mechanical abrasion as your dog chews

product_name: 8in1 Vitality Brewer’s Yeast Tablets
summary:
• Brewer's yeast tablets as a food supplement for dogs
  • With B-vitamins and trace elements
  • Made with omega-3 fatty acids to support skin and coat
  • Enriched with garlic
  • Resealable container
description:
Specially designed for dogs with dry, lack-lustre fur, these 8in1 Vitality Brewer’s Yeast Tablets are suitable as a food supplement for all breeds of dog. They have been specially developed to support healthy skin and a glossy coat. These tablets contain a range of selected ingredients and beneficial nutrients.
8in1 Vitality Brewer’s Yeast Tablets are rich in B-vitamins and provide your dog with trace elements and omega-3 fatty acids from added fish oil. The nutrient complex can help to balance out any nutrient deficiencies and reduce the risk of excessive hair loss. These brewer's yeast tablets have been developed in collaboration with veterinarians.

8in1 Vitality Brewer’s Yeast Tablets at a glance:
  • Supplementary food for dogs of all breeds
  • Developed for dogs with dry, dull coats
  • Nutrient complex with brewer's yeast: contains beneficial B-vitamins, protein and zinc
  • Enriched with omega-3 fatty acids: from added fish oil, offering additional support for skin and coat
  • Combats hair loss: can help to reduce the risk of hair loss caused by nutrient deficiencies
  • With garlic: offers an unpleasant scent for parasites
  • Without artificial colours or preservatives
  • Developed with veterinarians
  • Resealable container: with 260 tablets
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Yeast (87% brewer's yeast), oils and fats (including 0.8% fish oil), vegetable by-products, vegetables (1.2% garlic powder), minerals.

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives:
Vitamin B1 (900mg), vitamin B2 (4800mg), vitamin B6 (59mg), biotin (2000mcg), niacinamide (1200mg), iron [ferrous(II)-carbonate (siderite)] (1914mg), zinc [zinc oxide] (3270mg), copper [cupric(II)-sulphate pentahydrate] (2.5mg), manganese [manganous(II)-sulphate monohydrate] (323mg).
feeding_recommendations:
Feeding recommendation:
8in1 Vitality Brewer’s Yeast Tablets is a supplementary food for dogs.
 
Dog's weight Daily serving in tablets
<4kg 1 tablet
4 - 8 kg 2 tablets
8 - 12 kg 3 tablets
12 - 16 kg 4 tablets
>16kg 5 tablets

Please note:
Due to its increased content of cobalt, zinc, manganese and iron in comparison with complete food, this supplementary food should only account for up to 1.8% of your dog's daily intake.

  • With 9 essential vitamins and 5 minerals

This 8in1 Vitality Multivitamin Tablets for Puppies has been specially-developed to do just this, with tablets for daily food supplementation, each containing a range of key ingredients.
8in1 Vitality Multivitamin Tablets for Puppies provide your dog with important vitamins and minerals, including calcium to help support the development of healthy bones and teeth. Fish oil has also been included, as a source of omega-3 fatty acids such as DHA.

  • Rich in calcium: can help support the growth and maintenance of healthy bones and teeth
  • With high-quality fish oil: source of omega-3 fatty acids such as DHA

summary: Tubidog Salmon Crème, a delicious delicacy made with plenty of fresh salmon and rich in polyunsaturated fatty acids. Ideal as a snack between meals or as a way to disguise medication. Made in Germany.
description:
Tubidog Salmon Pâté for dogs is an innovative treat made from premium salmon. Reward your dog with this tasty treat when training, when out on journeys or just because you love your dog.
The Tubidog snack comes in a convenient screw cap tube and is a great way to convince your dog to take medication. It is gluten-free and suitable for dogs with allergies. This premium quality dog snack, rich in fresh salmon is easy to digest and well accepted. Tubidog is manufactured in Germany.

 

Tubidog Salmon Pâté at a glance:

  • Snack paste for dogs
  • Made with lots of fresh salmon of human grade
  • Well-accepted
  • Rich in polyunsaturated fatty acids
  • Ideal to disguise medication
  • Convenient, clean and easy to portion
  • Soft-touch tube with a twist cap
  • Developed and made in Germany
  • Looks and smells appetising
  • No fish bones, fish waste or similar
Tubidog Salmon Pâté – the healthy way to spoil your dog.

product_name: Royal Canin Veterinary Canine - Glycobalance
summary:
• Complete dietetic dry food for adult dogs
  • Can help manage blood glucose levels in dogs with diabetes
  • Reduced mono- and disaccharide content
  • With a moderate fat content

description:
If your dog has diabetes, it is essential that you choose a diet that has been specifically developed to meet its unique nutritional needs. Royal Canin Veterinary Canine - Glycobalance has been created to help regular glucose supply in dogs. It has a reduced sugar content and its special recipe can help to regulate blood sugar levels after meals, helping to support a balanced metabolism.

This Royal Canin Veterinary Canine - Glycobalance has a high protein content, which works with the moderate fat content to help maintain your dog's muscle mass while supporting weight management. It offers a balanced recipe that is particularly well-accepted - even fussier dogs will love its delicious flavour.

Royal Canin Veterinary Canine - Glycobalance at a glance:
  • Complete dietetic food for adult dogs, to help regulate glucose supply in dogs with diabetes
Diabetes management
The special recipe can support post-prandial blood sugar levels and muscle maintenance, with a moderate fat content and reduced levels of starch.
Based on scientific findings
This dietetic dry food contains a reduced content of digestible carbohydrates and essential nutrients, to boost your pet's vitality.
 
  • Lower total sugar content: reduced levels of mono- and disaccharides
  • Supports blood sugar regulation: for glucomodulation after meals
  • High protein content: essential for maintaining muscle mass
  • Reduced starch content: lower levels of easily-digestible carbohydrates, with a low glycaemic index
  • Moderate fat content: eases weight manangement
  • Nutrient-rich: with all the vital vitamins and minerals your dog needs
  • Well-accepted: very tasty

  • When feeding your pet with a veterinary diet, you should take your pet to the vet for a check-up at least every 6 months
  • Should your pet's health worsen while using this product, please seek veterinary advice immediately

These tablets are not only rich in vitamins, but also provide your dog with important omega-3 fatty acids and calcium.   • No artificial colours or preservatives

product_name: 8in1 Vitality Deter
summary:
• Functional food supplement for dogs and puppies
  • Can reduce the tendency to eat faeces
  • Creates an unpleasant taste in faeces
  • With valuable vitamins and minerals
  • Made in Germany
description:
The 8in1 Vitality Deter are a specially-developed food supplement for dogs, designed to help reduce unwanted behaviour such as eating faeces. The tablets contain a special formula that can make the taste of faeces unappealing to your pet, offering a practical support in everyday life with your dog or puppy.

In addition to their targeted function, the 8in1 Vitality Deter tablets also have a recipe rich in vital substances. Yeasts, vegetables and fish oil provide valuable vitamins and minerals that can contribute to your pet's daily diet. The tablets are manufactured in Germany and contain no artificial colours or preservatives.

8in1 Vitality Deter at a glance:
  • High-quality food supplement for dogs
  • Can reduce the risk of faecal eating (coprophagia) in dogs and puppies
  • Special formula: produces faeces with an unpleasant taste, can reduce the tendency to eat faeces
  • Rich in vital nutrients: with yeasts, vegetables and fish oil, source of valuable vitamins and minerals
  • Made in Germany: high quality
  • Free from artificial colours and preservatives
  • With expertise: developed with vets

product_name: 8in1 Vitality Glucosamine + MSM Tablets
summary:
• High-quality food supplement for adult and older dogs
  • Developed to support natural mobility
  • With vitamin C for better cartilage function
  • With MSM and glucosamine
  • Without artificial additives
description:
The 8in1 Vitality Glucosamine + MSM Tablets are a well-designed supplement for adult and senior dogs, developed to support natural mobility. Among other things, the recipe contains glucosamine, which occurs naturally in the joints, as well as MSM, a high-quality sulphur compound that plays a role in many processes in the body.

It also contains vitamin C, which contributes to healthy collagen formation and is important for cartilage function. The tablets were developed together with vets and contain no artificial colours or preservatives. The 8in1 Vitality Glucosamine + MSM Tablets are manufactured with care in Germany and are a practical supplement for your dog.

8in1 Vitality Glucosamine + MSM Tablets at a glance:
  • Practical food supplement for adult and senior dogs
  • Developed to support natural mobility
  • Rich in vitamin C: contributes to healthy collagen formation for cartilage function
  • With MSM: high-quality sulphur compound, important component of metabolic processes and body tissue
  • Glucosamine: occurs naturally in the joints
  • From Germany: manufactured with care
  • Developed with vets
  • Free from artificial colours and preservatives

Ingredients:
Minerals, yeasts, molluscs and crustaceans (22% glucosamine [from animal tissue]), oils and fats, vegetable by-products, methylsulphonylmethane (1%).

Vitamin C (35,000mg).

The 8in1 Vitality Glucosamine Tablets have been specially developed for adult and senior pets to support their natural mobility. The recipe contains high-quality glucosamine, as well as valuable vitamin C to support healthy collagen formation - an important component for the healthy function of cartilage tissue.

The tablets are free from artificial colours and preservatives and are manufactured in Germany. You can simply give them daily as a supplement to your dog's usual food. The tasty recipe of these 8in1 Vitality Glucosamine Tablets ensures they are readily-accepted by many dogs, ideal for uncomplicated daily use.

8in1 Vitality Glucosamine Tablets at a glance:
  • High-quality supplement for adult and senior dogs
  • Developed to support natural mobility
  • Rich in vitamin C: contributes to collagen formation for healthy cartilage function
  • Very tasty: for good acceptance
  • With glucosamine
  • Free from artificial colours and preservatives
  • High quality: manufactured in Germany

product_name: Royal Canin French Bulldog Loaf
summary:
• Wet food especially for French Bulldogs
  • Soft mousse texture, easy to chew
  • Enriched with EPA and DHA for bones and joints
  • Supports digestion and optimal stool consistency
description:
Royal Canin French Bulldog Loaf has been specially developed to provide your French Bulldog with a meal that is adapted to its specific nutritional needs, that is full of flavour and easy to digest. The soft mousse texture makes it easy to eat and chew - ideal for dogs that prefer a soft consistency.

The recipe combines highly-digestible proteins with selected fibres that contribute to optimal stool consistency and can help limit excess gas formation. Supplemented with EPA and DHA and a precise balance of calcium and phosphorus, the food supports healthy bone and joint function.

Royal Canin French Bulldog Loaf at a glance:
  • Nutritious wet dog food tailored to French Bulldogs
  • Soft mousse: easy to chew
  • Highly-digestible proteins: promote good digestibility
  • Selected fibres: contribute to optimal stool consistency
  • EPA and DHA: support healthy joint function
  • Calcium and phosphorus: balanced ratio to support bones and joints
  • With vitamin D3: contributes to the healthy function of the immune system
  • Supports skin and coat: selected nutrients for a well-groomed appearance
  • Reduced gas formation: specially formulated for sensitive dogs of this breed
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Meat and animal by-products, vegetable by-products, grains, minerals, oils and fats.

product_name: PEDIGREE® COMPLETE™ Puppy Beef & Vegetables
summary:
• Dry food for puppies and junior dogs
  • With beef and vegetables
  • Natural ingredients, vitamins and minerals
  • Enriched with prebiotics and superfoods
  • No artificial colours or flavours
description:
PEDIGREE® COMPLETE™ Puppy Beef & Vegetables is specially formulated for your young dogs, offering a delicious blend of beef and vegetables in every bite. This balanced dry food is made with natural ingredients and provides everything your puppy needs for a lively start in life. The tasty kibble is easy to chew and helps encourage healthy eating habits from day one.

Enriched with essential vitamins, minerals, prebiotics and superfoods, PEDIGREE® COMPLETE™ Puppy Beef & Vegetables supports your puppy’s everyday wellbeing. The recipe contains no added artificial colours or flavours, so you can feel confident about what goes into your puppy’s bowl. Give your young pet the best foundation for a happy, active life with this wholesome dry food.

PEDIGREE® COMPLETE™ Puppy Beef & Vegetables at a glance:
  • Complete dry food for puppies and junior dogs
  • Natural ingredients: made with beef and vegetables for a tasty meal
  • Vitamins and minerals: supports daily vitality and wellbeing
  • Prebiotics and superfoods: for optimal digestion and overall health
  • No artificial colours or flavours: only natural goodness in every bite
  • Balanced nutrition: tailored to the needs of growing puppies
  • Tasty kibble texture: encourages chewing and enjoyment
  • Trusted brand: PEDIGREE is known for quality and care for dogs
  • Daily feeding: suitable as a complete meal for puppies
  • Supports a shiny coat: with selected B-vitamins and zinc
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Cereals*, meat and animal by-products (including 4% beef), oils and fats, vegetable by-products (including 3%
dried beet pulp*), minerals, vegetables* (including 0.7% mix of dried peas and carrots, equivalent to 4% mix of peas and carrots), yeast (including 0.4% brewer's yeast).
*natural ingredients

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives:
Vitamin B₂ (13.3mg), vitamin D₃ (1594 IU), vitamin E (100mg), biotin (0.18mg), copper [cupric(II) sulphate pentahydrate] (8.1mg), iodine [potassium iodide] (2mg), manganese [manganous sulphate monohydrate] (24.8mg), selenium [sodium selenite] (0.15mg), zinc [zinc sulphate monohydrate] (70.1mg).
Technological additives:
Antioxidants, preservatives.

Analytical constituents:
Protein (25%), fat content (11.5%), inorganic (7.4%), crude fibre (2%), calcium (1.5%), phosphorus (1.1%).

Energy per 100g: 369kcal
feeding_recommendations:
Feeding recommendation:
PEDIGREE® COMPLETE™ Puppy Beef & Vegetables is a complete food for dogs.

For puppies soften dry food with water. Account for the calories coming from treats. Feeding amounts are intended as guidelines only. Adjust the amount of food according to the age, size and activity level of your puppy. Divide into portions for feeding throughout the day. Please introduce food gradually when switching diets. For more detailed information, please visit our website. Fresh water should always be available. Store closed, in a cool and dry place.

product_name: Hollings Venison Strips
summary: Gluten-free and high-protein dog snacks, made with 100% venison. Rich in B vitamins, perfect as a natural treat or reward.
description:
Hollings Venison Strips are a tasty single-ingredient and protein-rich treat - made with 100% venison. High in protein, the Hollings Venison Strips are both nutritious and tempting for even the fussiest of eaters.

Venison is a great source of B vitamins to help maintain energy levels and minerals. A novel protein, venison is also an excellent alternative for those dogs who may have sensitivities. Hollings Venison Strips are great to use as a natural treat or reward.


Hollings Venison Strips at a glance:
  • Delicious treats for adult dogs: made with one source of protein - venison
  • Gluten-free recipe
  • Made with high-quality venison: a great protein alternative for dogs with sensitivities
  • 5 tasty strips per pack
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Vension (100%).
feeding_recommendations:
Feeding recommendation:
Hollings Venison Strips is a supplementary treat for dogs. 

Not suitable for puppies, dogs with poor teeth or elderly dogs. These treats are natural and can vary in size. Please always check that they are a suitable size for your pet before feeding.

product_name: Cesar Junior with Chicken, Rice & Vegetables
summary: Complete food for puppies, with added calcium and phosphorus to support growth and high-quality proteins for strong muscles and bones, in a crunchy and soft kibble, with prebiotics and superfoods.
description:
Cesar Junior with Chicken, Rice & Vegetables is the perfect dog food for your puppy discovering the world. The balanced recipe with quality chicken, rice and vegetables provides your young dog with everything needed for a great start in life. Crunchy and soft kibble pieces are specially designed for small mouths, making every meal a delightful experience.

With Cesar Junior with Chicken, Rice & Vegetables, you can support your puppy's growth thanks to calcium and phosphorus, helping to maintain strong muscles and bones. Added prebiotics and superfoods promote digestion, while natural antioxidants such as vitamin E help support your dog's natural defenses. Share the joy of true friendship with your puppy - every single day!

Cesar Junior with Chicken, Rice & Vegetables at a glance:

  • Dry food for puppies, specially designed for small puppy mouths
  • Growth support: calcium and phosphorus aid development
  • High-quality proteins: help build muscles and bones
  • Crunchy and tender: kibble texture ideal for young dogs
  • Complete recipe: 100% complete with prebiotics and superfoods
  • Natural antioxidants: vitamin E supports natural defenses
  • Brand message: share the joy of true friendship with your puppy

summary: Complete food for puppies, with added calcium and phosphorus to support growth and high-quality proteins for strong muscles and bones, in a crunchy and soft kibble, with prebiotics and superfoods.
description:
Cesar Junior with Chicken, Rice & Vegetables is the perfect dog food for your puppy discovering the world. The balanced recipe with quality chicken, rice and vegetables provides your young dog with everything needed for a great start in life. Crunchy and soft kibble pieces are specially designed for small mouths, making every meal a delightful experience.

With Cesar Junior with Chicken, Rice & Vegetables, you can support your puppy's growth thanks to calcium and phosphorus, helping to maintain strong muscles and bones. Added prebiotics and superfoods promote digestion, while natural antioxidants such as vitamin E help support your dog's natural defenses. Share the joy of true friendship with your puppy - every single day!

Cesar Junior with Chicken, Rice & Vegetables at a glance:

  • Dry food for puppies, specially designed for small puppy mouths
  • Growth support: calcium and phosphorus aid development
  • High-quality proteins: help build muscles and bones
  • Crunchy and tender: kibble texture ideal for young dogs
  • Complete recipe: 100% complete with prebiotics and superfoods
  • Natural antioxidants: vitamin E supports natural defenses
  • Brand message: share the joy of true friendship with your puppy
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Grains (including 4% rice in the circular and triangular kibble**), meat and animal by-products (32%, including 4% fresh chicken in the square kibble**), oils and fats (including 0.3% fish oil), vegetable by-products (including 3% sugar beet pulp), minerals, vegetables (including 0.5% dried carrots, equivalent to 4% carrots; 1% dried peas, equivalent to 4% peas in the circular and triangular kibble**), herbs (including 0.4% herbs de Provence), yeast (including 0.2% brewer's yeast).
**Triangular and circular kibble typically 85% of product and square semi-moist kibble typically 15% of product

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives:
Vitamin D3 (1505 IU), vitamin E (100mg), copper(II) sulphate pentahydrate (7.8mg), potassium iodide (2mg), sodium selenite (0.18mg), zinc oxide (69.2mg), manganese(II) oxide (24.4mg).

product_name: Wolf of Wilderness Wild Chews "High Prairie" Beef Scalp
summary: Species-appropriate and natural chew, in a 100% grain-free recipe, with beef scalp as the sole source of protein, to provide your dog with irresistible chewing fun. Try it now!
description:
Wolf of Wilderness Wild Chews "High Prairie" Beef Scalp at a glance:

  • Based on the dietary habits of wolves in the wild: for dogs of all breeds and sizes
  • 100% grain-free: also suitable for dogs with a grain intolerance
  • High-quality protein: high protein content, suitable for sensitive dogs
  • Gently air-dried: for crispy, aromatic flavour
  • Species-appropriate and natural: without the addition of artificial preservatives, colourings or flavourings
  • Rich in protein from a single source: 100% beef
  • Low fat content

Please note: dog bones, treats and snacks are available in different types and sizes. Make sure you choose a size and shape that is suitable for your pet. For their safety, please supervise your pets when they are enjoying a treat or bone.
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Dried beef scalp.
feeding_recommendations:
Feeding recommendation:
Wolf of Wilderness Wild Chews "High Prairie" Beef Scalp is a supplementary snack for dogs.

Feed as a snack or reward between meals. Please include the snacks in your dog's daily food intake. Only feed under supervision. Store in a cool, dry place away from sunlight. Weight deviation possible due to drying of the product.

Always provide fresh drinking water.

product_name: Eukanuba Special Care Adult Large Weight Control
summary:
• Reduced-fat dry food for large and extra-large breed dogs
  • To support weight management
  • With tasty chicken as a source of protein
  • Provides calcium, L-carnitine and glucosamine
description:
If your dog struggles with losing excess weight, it may be recommended that you move your pet to a specially-tailored diet that has an optimised energy- and nutrient profile. Eukanuba Special Care Adult Large Weight Control has been adapted to the needs of large and extra-large breed adult dogs, with a reduced fat content that can help support weight control.
This Eukanuba Special Care Adult Large Weight Control dry food contains tasty chicken, which provides your dog with top-quality protein. The recipe also contains ingredients such as calcium, which is essential for maintaining healthy bones, as well as glucosamine and L-carnitine. Eukanuba Special Care Adult Large Weight Control contains a special fibre combination that can help to promote balanced digestion. The kibble has a special hexagonal shape and contains a DentaDefense formula, which can help to support dental care.

Eukanuba Special Care Adult Large Weight Control at a glance:
  • Tailored dry food for large breed adult dogs (25 - 40 kg) between 1.5 - 6 years old and extra-large breed adult dogs (>40kg) between 2 - 5 years old
  • Weight control: 30% less fat that regular Eukanuba Adult food, to help support weight management and maintenance
  • Made with chicken: source of high-quality protein, to help maintain muscle mass
  • Source of glucosamine: a natural component of cartilage
  • With omega-3 and -6 fatty acids: can help to support healthy skin and glossy coat
  • Prebiotics and beet pulp: to support healthy digestive function
  • With calcium: to help maintain healthy bones and teeth
  • DentaDefense kibble: special hexagonal shape, to support dental care
  • 100% complete and balanced: ideal as daily nutrition for large dogs
  • Without artificial colours and flavours
  • Contains L-carnitine
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Maize, dried chicken and -turkey (15%, including 11% chicken, a natural source of glucosamine, chondroitin and taurine), fresh chicken (10%), barley, millet, wheat, dried sugar beet pulp (3.1%), fish meal, chicken gravy, poultry fat, minerals (including 0.36% sodium hexametaphosphate), dried whole egg, linseeds, dried brewer's yeast [a natural source of B-vitamins and selenium], fructo-oligosacharides (0.26%, a natural prebiotic), glucosamine [from animal tissue] (0.04%).

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives:
Vitamin A (15,000 IU), vitamin D3 (1500 IU), vitamin E (250mg), beta-carotene (5mg), L-carnitine (50mg), iron [ferrous(II)-amino acids chelate hydrate] (50mg), copper [cupric(II)-amino acids chelate hydrate] (5mg), zinc [amino acids zinc chelate hydrate] (62.5mg), manganese [amino acids manganous chelate hydrate] (10mg), iodine [calcium iodate anhydrous] (1.5mg), selenium [sodium selenite] (0.1mg).
Technological additives:
Antioxidants [tocopherol-rich extracts from vegetable oil] (5mg).
Sensory additives:
Flavourings [rosemary extract].
feeding_recommendations:
Feeding recommendation:
Eukanuba Special Care Adult Large Weight Control is a complete food for dogs.
 
Dog's weight in kg Daily serving in g
Weight loss Weight maintenance
25kg 225g 305 - 350 g
30kg 255g 350 - 405 g
35kg 290g 390 - 455 g
40kg 320g 430 - 500 g
50kg 375g 510 - 590 g
70kg 485g 660 - 760 g
90kg 585g 795 - 920 g

These recommendations are merely guidelines and the actual amount of food your dog needs may vary. Adapt daily servings to help your dog maintain an ideal bodyweight. Ensure fresh drinking water is always available.

product_name: Hill's Prescription Diet k/d Kidney Care with Salmon
summary:
• Dietetic dry food to support kidney function in chronic- and acute kidney insufficiency in adult cats
  • Reduced phosphorus- and protein content
  • Appetite-stimulating
  • With ActivBiome+
description:
Does your cat require a special diet to support kidney function? Hill's Prescription Diet k/d Kidney Care with Salmon is a diet dry food specially developed for cats with chronic or acute kidney insufficiency. The carefully-designed recipe features a low phosphorus and sodium content as well as limited but high-quality protein with a valuable amino acid profile. Premium fish oil provides essential omega-3 fatty acids, which play an important role in your cat’s nutrition.

Hill's Prescription Diet k/d Kidney Care with Salmon impresses with its excellent taste and the appetite-stimulating Enhanced Appetite Trigger (E.A.T.) technology, which encourages your cat to eat. The innovative ActivBiome+ technology with its special prebiotic blend supports digestion and the gut microbiome. 

Hill's Prescription Diet k/d Kidney Care with Salmon at a glance:
  • Dietetic complete food to support kidney function in chronic- or acute kidney insufficiency in adult cats
  • Low phosphorus- and sodium content: important for natural kidney function
  • Limited protein content: high-quality protein sources with a valuable amino acid profile
  • Premium fish oil: source of essential omega-3 fatty acids
  • ActivBiome+ technology: special prebiotic blend to support digestion and the gut microbiome
  • Nutrient-rich recipe: with all essential vitamins, minerals and trace elements 
  • With salmon: excellent taste
  • Appetite-stimulating: with Enhanced Appetite Trigger (E.A.T.) to encourage food intake
  • High-quality ingredients: made from selected raw materials
  • With L-carnitine 
  • Recommended by veterinarians
Important Information:
  • Please consult your vet before feeding your pet with a veterinary diet. Your vet will be able to give further information and advice on possible treatment
  • When feeding your pet with a veterinary diet, you should take your pet to the vet for a check-up at least every 6 months
  • Should your pet's health worsen while using this product, please seek veterinary advice immediately
  • By adding this product to your shopping basket you are confirming that you have read and understood the above information
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Vegetable by-products, grains, vegetable protein extracts, oils and fats (1.7% fish oil), meat and animal by-products, fish and fish products (5% salmon), eggs and egg products, minerals.
Protein sources: maize protein meal, chicken and turkey meal, rice protein, salmon meal, pea protein, dried whole egg
ActivBiome+ Kidney Defence prebiotic blend (1.1%): betaine, oat bran, fructo-oligosaccharides

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives:
Vitamin A (7094 IU), vitamin D3 (709 IU), vitamin E (707mg), vitamin C (99mg), beta-carotene (2.1mg), L-carnitine (585mg), iron (48.8mg), iodine (1.2mg), copper (4.8mg), manganese (5mg), zinc (85.5mg), selenium (0.1mg), betaine (5000mg), with natural antioxidant.
feeding_recommendations:
Feeding recommendation:
Hill's Prescription Diet k/d Kidney Care with Salmon is a complete dietetic food for cats.

Feed exclusively the recommended Prescription Diet food. Before use, ask your veterinarian for a specific feeding recommendation for your pet. The stated daily amounts are only a guideline and serve as a starting point. Consult your veterinarian if you are unsure. Fresh water should be available at all times.
 
Dry food only
Cat's weight (kg) Daily serving in g
2kg 35g
3kg 45g
4kg 55g
5kg 65g
6kg+ 12g per kg
 
Mixed feeding (82g cans + dry food in g)
Cat's weight (kg) Daily serving in g
2kg ½ + 25g
3kg ½ + 35g
4kg ½ + 45g
5kg ½ + 60g
6kg+ 1 + 10g per kg
 
Mixed feeding (85g pouches + dry food in g)
Cat's weight (kg) Daily serving in g
2kg 1 + 15g
3kg 1 + 25g
4kg 1 + 35g
5kg 1 + 45g
6kg+ 1 + 9g per kg

Feeding this food for the first time? Over a period of 7 days or more, gradually mix increasing amounts of the new food with decreasing amounts of the previous food. Always provide fresh water! Your pet’s nutritional needs may change with age. Consult your veterinarian at every check-up.

Recommended feeding duration: initially up to 6 months for chronic kidney insufficiency and 2 -4 weeks for acute kidney insufficiency. It is recommended to seek veterinary advice before use or before extending the feeding duration.

product_name: Royal Canin Appetite Control Care AirLift™ Mousse
summary:
• Wet food for cats prone to begging behavior
  • Airy, appetising mousse texture
  • Supports weight control and good satiety
  • Fewer calories to allow for larger portions
  • Easy to eat, low odour
description:
Royal Canin Appetite Control Care AirLift™ Mousse is the perfect wet food for your demanding pet prone to begging behaviour. The airy, whipped mousse ensures a particularly pleasant eating experience and makes the bowl appear fuller, so that your cat feels satisfied more quickly. Thanks to the unique texture, the food is not only readily-accepted, but is also easy to serve and mix.

With the adjusted calorie content of Royal Canin Appetite Control Care AirLift™ Mousse, you can offer your pet larger portions without increasing its energy intake too much. The cat food is low in odour and ensures a clean feeding area, while the high moisture content contributes to daily fluid intake.

Royal Canin Appetite Control Care AirLift™ Mousse at a glance:
  • Complete wet food for cats
For cats with strong begging behavior
Royal Canin Appetite Control Care AirLift™ Mousse has a special texture to help control your cat's weight while meeting its nutritional needs.
Reduces begging
The airy, whipped mousse ensures a fuller food bowl and at the same time allows larger portions thanks to an adapted energy density.
Unique texture
The delicious mousse not only provides sensory stimulation, it is also easy to eat, easy to mix and ensures clean eating.
Suitable for mixed feeding

product_name: Smilla Special Needs Pouches Indoor Chunks with Gravy
variant_name: Saver Pack: Tuna & Green Beans (24 x 85g)
summary: Complete wet food for adult cats, designed to support weight control for indoor cats, with a flavoursome recipe rich in tasty chunks with nutritious vegetables, with beneficial taurine and vitamins.
description:
Smilla Special Needs Pouches Indoor Chunks with Gravy combines tasty meat sources with nutritious vegetables, providing your cat with irresistible variety. This complete food for cats comes in practical pouches, perfectly portioned to provide your cat with freshness at every meal.
The best ingredients, beneficial vitamins and vital taurine provide your cat with all the building blocks it needs for optimum nutrition. The tasty wet food is free from artificial flavours, colours and preservatives, as well as containing no soya or lactose. Each pouch contains an individual portion of fresh and juicy food, easy to open and clean to serve.

Smilla Special Needs Pouches Indoor Chunks with Gravy at a glance:
  • With vitamins and minerals: these play a vital role in your cat's nutrition, with vitamin E to support bodily immune system
  • Enriched with taurine: an essential amino acid for cats, to help support healthy heart function and vision
  • Tailored energy- and fat content: ideal for less active indoor cats
  • Without added sugar, flavour enhancers or preservatives
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Tuna & Green Beans:
Meat and animal by-products, fish and fish by-products (4% tuna), vegetable protein extracts, vegetable by-products, minerals, vegetables (0.45% dried green beans, equivalent to 4% green beans), oils and fats, parsley (0.05%).

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives:
Vitamin E (300 IU), L-carnitine (200mg), zinc [zinc sulphate monohydrate] (16mg), manganese [manganous(II)-oxide] (2mg), copper [cupric(II)-sulphate pentahydrate] (1.2mg), iodine [calcium iodate anhydrous] (0.2mg), iron [ferrous(II)-sulphate monohydrate] (10mg), taurine (520mg), biotin (170μg).

product_name: Smilla Special Needs Sterilised Adult Pouches Chunks with Vegetables
summary: Tasty chunks in a succulent sauce, providing complete wet food for sterilised adult cats, with an adapted energy- and nutrient content, with practical fresh pouches in a mixed pack.
description:
Smilla Special Needs Sterilised Adult Pouches Chunks with Vegetables combine delicious meat sources with vegetables for tasty variety in your cat's food bowl. The complete food for cats comes in practical fresh pouches, perfectly portioned for daily meals.

The finest ingredients, valuable vitamins and essential taurine provide your cat with important nutritional building blocks. This Smilla Special Needs Sterilised Adult Pouches Chunks with Vegetables wet food is free from artificial flavours, colours and preservatives, as well as containing no soya or lactose. Each pack contains a single portion of fresh and juicy food that is easy to open and serve.

Every cat's needs are different, and neutered cats have a lower daily energy requirement. Smilla Special Needs Sterilised Adult Pouches Chunks with Vegetables, therefore, has an adapted energy content to meet these needs. Smilla Special Needs Sterilised Adult Pouches Chunks with Vegetables contains DL-methionine, which plays an important nutritional role as an essential amino acid. As a side effect, it can reduce the urine pH value and thus actively support urinary tract health.

The Mixed Pack contains the following flavour varieties:
  • 6 x Salmon & Carrots
  • 6 x Turkey & Green Beans
Smilla Special Needs Sterilised Adult Pouches Chunks with Vegetables at a glance:
  • Maintenance of ideal weight: the adjusted fat and energy content can help your cat maintain its ideal weight
  • DL-methionine: plays an important nutritional role as an essential amino acid, as well as helping to reduce the urine pH value and thus actively support the urinary tract
  • With vitamins and minerals
  • With taurine: can support your cat's healthy heart function and eyesight.
  • Without added sugar, flavour enhancers or preservatives
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Salmon & Carrots:
Meat and animal by-products, fish and fish by-products (4% salmon), vegetable protein extracts, vegetable by-products, minerals, vegetables (0.45% dried carrots, equivalent to 4% carrots), oils and fats, parsley (0.05%).
Turkey & Green Beans:
Meat and animal by-products (4% turkey), vegetable protein extracts, vegetable by-products, minerals, vegetables (0.45% dried green beans, equivalent to 4% green beans), oils and fats, thyme (0.05%)

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives:
Vitamin E (300 IU), L-carnitine (200mg), zinc [zinc sulphate monohydrate] (16mg), manganese [manganous(II) oxide] (2mg), copper [cupric(II) sulphate pentahydrate] (1.2mg), iodine [calcium iodate anhydrous] (0.2mg), iron [ferrous(II) sulphate monohydrate] (10mg), DL-methionine (500mg), taurine (520mg), biotin (170μg).

Energy per 100 g:
ME (FEDIAF, 2021) 311 kJ / 74.43kcal

product_name: Purizon Single Meat 6 x 200g
summary:
• Complete wet cat food
  • Made with only one source of animal protein
  • With lots of meat and offal
  • Carefully-selected fruit and vegetables
  • Grain-free and protein-rich recipes
description:
Purizon Single Meat 6 x 200g is a complete wet food for adult cats, made using one selected source of animal protein per flavour variety. It contains up to 75% meat and beneficial offal to help maintain muscle mass, in grain-free recipes low in carbohydrates.
This Purizon Single Meat 6 x 200g is inspired by the variety that nature has to offer, with a range of fruits, vegetables and herbs. It is the ideal choice for sensitive cats.

The Mixed Pack contains the following flavour varieties:
  • Chicken with Chamomile Blossoms
  • Beef with Hibiscus Blossoms
  • Lamb with Hop Blossoms
Purizon Single Meat complete wet cat food at a glance:
  • High in protein: up to 76% animal ingredients
  • Only one source of animal protein
  • Very tasty: lots of tasty meat and hearty offal
  • Pure nature: carefully selected fruit and vegetables
  • Grain-free recipe: also suitable for sensitive cats
Purizon – Nature is our Inspiration!

Find out more about the entire range Purizon Cat Food.

product_name: Feringa Vitality Creamy Snacks
summary: Feringa Vitality Creamy Snack promotes your cat's digestion and helps to reduce hairballs - thanks to a grain-free recipe with natural oils and psyllium husks. Try it now!
description:
Good food brings cosiness and warmth. Feringa gives your cat this cosy feeling. We lovingly use the best ingredients from nature: high-quality meat, fresh vegetables and fruit in our delicious, grain-free recipes. We want every bite to be a touch of home and love, promising your cat well-being and flavour.

Feringa Vitality Creamy Snack has been developed to support your cat's special needs with the power of natural ingredients. Our hairball formula is enriched with oils and psyllium husks to aid digestion. Our delicious, grain-free recipe offers additional support in combating hairballs.

Feringa Vitality Hairball Care Creamy Snack at a glance:
  • Enriched with oils and psyllium husks to promote digestion
  • Natural vitality: supports your cat's special needs with the power of natural ingredients
  • Grain-free recipe: ideal for cats with grain intolerances; contains no artificial additives, no gluten and no added sugar
  • With taurine: essential amino acid to support vision and heart function.

In a range of tasty flavours:
  • Chicken
  • Salmon with Chicken
  • Tuna with Chicken
© Feringa: Homemade flavour starts with love! ©
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Chicken:
Water (50.6%), chicken (42%), cassava starch, chicken oil (2%), inulin (1%), psyllium husk powder (1%), yeast.
Tuna with Chicken:
Water (50.6%), tuna (26%), chicken (16%), cassava starch, chicken oil (2%), inulin (1%), psyllium husk powder (1%), yeast.
Salmon with Chicken:
Water (50.6%), salmon (26%), chicken (16%), cassava starch, chicken oil (2%), inulin (1%), psyllium husk powder (1%), yeast.

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives:
Taurine (1000mg).
feeding_recommendations:
Feeding recommendation:
Feringa Vitality Creamy Snacks are a supplementary food for adult cats.

As a snack or treat between meals. Take the amount fed into account in the daily amount. Always provide fresh drinking water. Store in the refrigerator after opening. Serve at room temperature.

product_name: Cosma Smoothies 6 x 50g
summary: Deliciously creamy puree combined with tasty fish or chicken broth in the Cosma smoothies! The combination of selected meat or fish with tasty vegetables offers a varied snack for your feline.
description:
Cosma Smoothies are a delicious, creamy treat for your cat. The varied snacks are ideal for in-between meals and encourage fluid intake thanks to the high broth content.

The carefully thought-out recipe for Cosma smoothies consists of meat and/or fish combined with delicious vegetables such as pumpkin, tomato and carrot. Refined with flavoured chicken or fish stock, these snacks are not only delicious, but also grain-free, sugar-free and gluten-free. Even fussy cats can't resist the unmistakable flavour of Cosma smoothies. 

Cosma Smoothies 6 x 50g at a glance:
  • Deliciously creamy puree: ideal as a reward between meals
  • Favours fluid absorption: due to the high content of fish or chicken stock
  • Also for fussy cats: irresistible flavour in many varieties
  • Varied snack: with plenty of meat and/or fish and flavoured vegetables
  • Species-appropriate nutrition: free from flavourings, preservatives and colourings
​​​​Cosma Smoothies are available in 3 delicious flavours:
  • Tender chicken breast, refined with aromatic pumpkin
  • Delicious tuna, flavoured with tasty tomatoes
  • Delicious tuna and tender chicken breast, refined with tasty carrots
The Mixed Pack contains:
  • 2 x Chicken with Pumpkin
  • 2 x Tuna with Tomato 
  • 2 x Tuna and Chicken with Carrot 
Discover Cosma Smoothies now and spoil your cat with lots of love and Cosma!
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Chicken with Pumpkin:
Chicken broth, chicken breast (30.0%), pumpkin (8.0%), starch mix (tapioca), yeast.
 
Tuna with Tomato:
Fish stock, tuna (8.0%), tomato (9.5%), starch mix (tapioca), yeast.

Tuna and Chicken with Carrot:
Fish broth, tuna (17.0%), chicken breast (13.0%), carrot (8.0%), starch mix (tapioca), yeast.

Additives:
According to the manufacturer, there are no additives. Cosma is made only from natural and high-quality raw materials. No additives such as flavour enhancers or artificial preservatives are used in the production process.
feeding_recommendations:
Feeding recommendation:
Cosma Smoothies 6 x 50g is a supplementary feed for cats. 

Up to 1 pouch as a snack or reward between meals. Please include the snacks in your cat's daily food intake.
Always provide fresh drinking water. Store in the refrigerator after opening. Serve at room temperature.

product_name: Cosma Asia Kitten in Jelly 6 x 85g
summary: Premium, supplementary cat food for kittens. This species-appropriate wet food is made with lots of fresh, succulent meat or fish in a delicious jelly - lightly enriched with rice for an exotic flavour.
description:
Cosma Asia Kitten wet cat food 6 x 85g at a glance:
  • Premium, supplementary wet cat food for kittens and young cats
  • Smaller chunks: ideal for little mouths and jaws
  • High meat or fish content: species-appropriate and easy to digest
  • Multi-protein: two protein sources
  • Species-appropriate nutrition
  • Lightly enriched with rice
  • Free from artificial flavours, preservatives and colourings
Cosma Asia Kitten wet cat food is a delicious and unique culinary experience for your growing cat! Each variety contains two protein sources from high-quality meat, fish or seafood and is lightly enriched with rice. The carefully-selected ingredients are gently prepared, in order to preserve all of the essential nutrients and the natural taste. The Cosma Asia supplementary wet cat food range is made from premium, natural ingredients and is completely free from artificial preservatives and flavours. Cosma Asia provides your cat with appropriate nutrition and offers an irresistible taste.

Cosma Asia Kitten 6 x 85g is available in the following flavours:
  • Tuna with Crab Meat in Jelly: chunks of light tuna with easy-to-digest crab meat in tasty jelly
  • Tuna with Salmon in Jelly: chunks of light tuna with salmon in tasty jelly
  • Chicken with Chicken Liver: tender pieces of chicken with tastz chicken liver in tasty jelly
The Cosma Asia Kitten Mixed Pack 6 x 85g contains: 
  • 2 x 85g Tuna with Crab Meat
  • 2 x 85g Tuna with Salmon
  • 2 x 85g Chicken with Chicken Liver
Cosma Asia – spoil your cat with lots of love and Cosma!

The Cosma Asia supplementary wet cat food range is made from premium, natural ingredients and is completely free from artificial preservatives and flavours. Cosma Asia provides your cat with appropriate nutrition and offers an irresistible taste.

Cosma Asia Kitten 6 x 85g is available in the following flavours:

The Cosma Asia Kitten Mixed Pack 6 x 85g contains:

product_name: Cosma Smoothies 6 x 50g
summary: Deliciously creamy puree combined with tasty fish or chicken broth in the Cosma smoothies! The combination of selected meat or fish with tasty vegetables offers a varied snack for your feline.
description:
Cosma Smoothies are a delicious, creamy treat for your cat. The varied snacks are ideal for in-between meals and encourage fluid intake thanks to the high broth content.

The carefully thought-out recipe for Cosma smoothies consists of meat and/or fish combined with delicious vegetables such as pumpkin, tomato and carrot. Refined with flavoured chicken or fish stock, these snacks are not only delicious, but also grain-free, sugar-free and gluten-free. Even fussy cats can't resist the unmistakable flavour of Cosma smoothies. 

Cosma Smoothies 6 x 50g at a glance:
  • Deliciously creamy puree: ideal as a reward between meals
  • Favours fluid absorption: due to the high content of fish or chicken stock
  • Also for fussy cats: irresistible flavour in many varieties
  • Varied snack: with plenty of meat and/or fish and flavoured vegetables
  • Species-appropriate nutrition: free from flavourings, preservatives and colourings
​​​​Cosma Smoothies are available in 3 delicious flavours:
  • Tender chicken breast, refined with aromatic pumpkin
  • Delicious tuna, flavoured with tasty tomatoes
  • Delicious tuna and tender chicken breast, refined with tasty carrots
The Mixed Pack contains:
  • 2 x Chicken with Pumpkin
  • 2 x Tuna with Tomato 
  • 2 x Tuna and Chicken with Carrot 
Discover Cosma Smoothies now and spoil your cat with lots of love and Cosma!

product_name: Scrumbles Gut Health Cat Food Pouches Classic Pâté Selection
summary: Delicious, grain-free wet food for cats, in handy pouches with a tender pâté containing 60% meat or fish, enriched with added prebiotics to support your cat's gut health.
description:
Support your cat's health and wellbeing from the age of 8 weeks with this Scrumbles Gut Health Cat Food Pouches Classic Pâté Selection, with a smooth, soft texture and unbeatable flavour. Each pouch contains 60% meat or fish to provide your cat with species-appropriate nutrition and delicious taste, in a selection pack offering chicken, salmon and turkey varieties. The consistency is easy to eat, making it ideal for everyone from kittens to seniors.
This Scrumbles Gut Health Cat Food Pouches Classic Pâté Selection is free from troublesome grains, with a hypoallergenic recipe that can be kinder to sensitive stomachs. The complete wet cat food is also enriched with added prebiotic inulin, which can support your cat's digestion and help to reduce unpleasant stool odour. It also contains no added sugar or artificial additives, as well as being in recyclable packaging.

The Classic Pâté Selection 8 x 85g contains the following flavour varieties:
  • 3 x Chicken
  • 2 x Salmon
  • 3 x Turkey
Scrumbles Gut Health Cat Food Pouches Classic Pâté Selection at a glance:
  • Complete wet food for all cats over the age of 8 weeks
  • High meat content: with 60% meat or fish to provide plenty of essential protein
  • Grain-free: suitable for more sensitive stomachs, in a hypoallergenic recipe
  • With added prebiotics: inulin can help to support digestion and reduce stool odour
  • In a smooth pâté: a soft texture that is both delicious and practical, as it is easy for any cat to eat
  • No added sugar: in a natural recipe free from added sugar and artificial additives
  • Easy to serve: simply tear open the pouch and pour out the food for your cat to enjoy
  • 100% recyclable packaging: care for the environment as well as your cat
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Chicken:
Chicken (60%), tapioca starch, minerals, inulin (0.4%).
Turkey:
Chicken (56%), tapioca starch, turkey (4%), minerals, inulin (0.4%).
Salmon:
Chicken (56%), tapioca starch, salmon (4%), minerals, inulin (0.4%).

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives:
Taurine (1000mg), vitamin E [all-rac-alpha-tocopheryl acetate] (100mg), zinc [zinc oxide] (10mg), manganese [manganous sulphate monohydrate] (2mg), iodine [calcium iodate anhydrous] (0.7mg), copper [copper(II) sulphate pentahydrate] (2mg), iron [iron(II) sulphate monohydrate] (2mg), biotin (100mcg), vitamin D3 [cholecalciferol] (300 IU).

Analytical constituents:
Crude protein (9.5%), crude fibre (0.5%), crude fat (5.5%), crude ash (2%), moisture (80%), energy (92.5kcal/100g).
feeding_recommendations:
Feeding recommendation:
Scrumbles Gut Health Cat Food Classic Pâté Selection is a complete food for cats.

Suitable for all cats over 8 weeks old. See pack for recommended serving.

Ensure fresh, clean drinking water is always available.

  • Grain-free recipes: ideal for more sensitive cats
  • With glucosamine and chondroitin sulphate
  • Two different flavours: chicken and carrots or salmon and green beans

product_name: Cosma Pure 6 x 80g
summary: Tasty wet food made with 50% meat or fish in whole pieces and delicious sauce, with single-source protein for sensitive cats, pure recipe without artificial additives and with all important nutrients.
description:
DISCOVER OUR PURE PREMIUM WET CAT FOOD, COSMA PURE: For very special moments of pleasure!

Cosma Pure 6 x 80g contains 50% delicious meat or fish in whole pieces, with a fine chicken- or fish sauce that contains all the essential nutrients your pet needs. This premium wet cat food is made with limited selected ingredients and plenty of meat or fish. It has been gently prepared to help retain the key nutrients needed for species-appropriate nutrition. Each Cosma Pure 6 x 80g recipe contains just one source of meat or fish protein, making it an ideal choice for sensitive cats.

Cosma Pure is available in the following flavour varieties:
  • Single Protein: Chicken
  • Single Protein: Skipjack Tuna
  • Single Protein: Salmon
The Mixed Pack contains the following flavour varieties:
  • 2 x Single Protein: Chicken
  • 2 x Single Protein: Skipjack Tuna
  • 2 x Single Protein: Salmon
Cosma Pure 6 x 80g at a glance:
  • Pure premium wet food for adult cats of all breeds
  • With natural, fresh ingredients that have been gently prepared
  • High meat content of 50%: delicious meat or fish to provide your cat with species-appropriate, beneficial protein and high digestibility
  • Light chicken or fish sauce to provide your cat with delicious fluids
  • Free from flavour enhancers, preservatives and colourings
  • Contributes to species-appropriate nutrition
  • Suitable for sensitive and fussy cats: with single-source protein from just one type of meat or fish
Try our Cosma Pure wet food and combine it with our popular Cosma dry food - your cat will love it!

Discover our Cosma dry food: Buy cheap dry cat food | zooplus
Discover our Cosma snacks: Buy cheap cat snacks | zooplus

product_name: Smilla Special Needs Senior Sterilised Chunks in Gravy with Beef & Carrots
summary: Complete wet cat food with a special recipe for older sterilised cats, enriched with L-carnitine and DL-methionine to support health and wellbeing, in a delicious grain-free recipe.
description:
Smilla Special Needs Senior Sterilised Chunks in Gravy with Beef & Carrots is a combination of tasty meat and vegetables, in a grain-free recipe offering delicious enjoyment for your cat. This wet food contains all the necessary nutrients for older sterilised cats. It comes in practical pouches, which helps to keep food fresh as well as offering an optimum serving size at each meal.

Smilla Special Needs Senior Sterilised Chunks in Gravy with Beef & Carrots at a glance:
  • Complete wet food with a special recipe for older sterilised cats
  • Grain-free: ideal for more sensitive cats
  • With omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids
  • Contains glucosamine and chondroitin sulphate
  • Enriched with taurine and biotin: essential nutrients to support your cat's health as it ages
  • With L-carnitine and DL-methionine
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Meat and animal by-products (4% beef), vegetable protein extracts, vegetable by-products (0.4% inulin), oils and fats, minerals, vegetables (0.45% dried carrot, equivalent to 4% carrot), 0.05% glucosamine, 0.05% chondroitin sulphate, 0.05% rosemary.

Additives per kg:
Nutritional additives: 
Vitamin E (300 IU), vitamin D3 (160 IU), L-carnitine (200mg), zinc [zinc sulphate monohydrate] (16mg), manganese [manganous(II) oxide] (2mg), copper [cupric(II) sulphate pentahydrate] (1.2mg), iodine [calcium iodate anhydrous] (0.2mg), iron [ferrous(II) sulphate monohydrate] (10mg), DL-methionine (500mg), taurine (520mg), biotin (170μg).

summary: Practical litter tray for cats, with extra-high walls to prevent loose litter and removable rim for easy cleaning. The tray also comes with a handy litter scoop.
description:
Create a place of cleanliness and comfort for your feline friend with the TIAKI Stormy Litter Tray - a must-have for every cat owner. With its sophisticated design, this litter tray is not only a practical but also a stylish addition to your home. The extra-high walls of the litter tray prevent loose litter from being scattered around the home when your cat digs, ensuring a clean environment.

Thanks to the removable rim, the tray can be cleaned in a flash so that your pet always has a hygienic place to go. The highlight is the lowered entrance with a small step - ideal for kittens or older cats that need easier access. A matching litter scoop is already included, which makes removing clumps a breeze.

TIAKI Stormy Litter Tray at a glance:
  • Fully equipped litter tray for cats
  • With high walls: reduces loose litter in the home
  • Lowered entrance: also ideal for older, sick or very young cats
  • Incl. litter scoop: litter tray ready for immediate use
  • Removable rim: for better access during cleaning
  • Type of tray: bowl litter tray
  • Material: plastic
  • Dimensions:
    • Total: L 50.5 x W 42.5 x H 27cm
    • Height of lower bowl (front / back): 14.5 / 19cm
    • Entry height: 15cm
  • Colour: dark grey / white

______________________________________________________________________________

TIAKI doesn't try to be special, as the unique relationship between you and your pet is already special - something that belongs only to you. Rather, with TIAKI we want to be a part of your daily life.
We want to be involved in your pet's every moment of happiness: the toy it nibbles on constantly, the leash it impatiently brings to you when it's time for a walk, or the bed it happily falls asleep in after an exciting day.
TIAKI should be the brand that is by your side in all situations: both in the beautiful, shiny moments that bring you both joy, as well as in the moments that are hairy, scratched or gnawed. That's where we want to be.
TIAKI. Part of your life.

product_name: TIAKI Sloth Toy Set with Catnip
description:
Real sloths are known for moving rather slowly. The cute TIAKI Sloth Toy Set with Catnip consists of two adorable soft toys in a funny sloth design, which your cat can quickly catapult around the room. Licking, biting, clawing and kicking are also allowed, of course! Thanks to its wonderfully fragrant catnip filling, this cute duo can have an extremely stimulating effect on many cats, so even ‘lazy cats’ can be coaxed out of their hiding places.

The faces of the two sloths in the TIAKI Sloth Toy Set with Catnip are embroidered and their fluffy fur is made of super soft sheep plush – so cosy! With the help of the practical hangers, you can easily store them hanging up when not in use or even attach them to a cat teaser – sloths can be quite versatile creatures too!

TIAKI Sloth Toy Set with Catnip at a glance:
  • Fun play soft toy set for cats
  • Set of two: perfect for multi-cat households
  • Cute sloths: with embroidered faces and soft sheepskin plush fur
  • Filled with catnip: gives off a gentle scent that can be stimulating for cats
  • With hangers: makes it easier to dry after a play session or to hang on cat fishing rods
  • New favourite toy: for licking, biting, clawing and kicking
  • Colour: beige / white / brown
  • Material: synthetic fibre
  • Dimensions: 7 x 7 x 2cm (L x W x H)


Note: 
For pet use only. Not suitable for children! Never leave pets unattended with the toy. No toy is indestructible. Do not allow your pet to continue using a toy that is damaged, broken or has missing parts. If small parts are accidentally swallowed, consult a vet immediately. Keep away from heat sources and open flames. Dispose of the product and packaging materials in accordance with local standards and regulations.

product_name: Wild Freedom Adult "Golden Valley" Sterilised Rabbit - Grain-Free
summary: Grain-free complete dry cat food made with tasty rabbit. This species-appropriate kibble is adapted to suit the changed metabolism and reduced energy requirements of neutered cats. High meat content.
description:
Wild Freedom Adult "Golden Valley" Sterilised Rabbit - Grain-Free dry cat food at a glance:
  • Complete dry food for adult cats
  • Based on the wild cat's natural diet: balanced, complete dry food for adult cats of all breeds and sizes
  • Adapted to the needs of neutered cats: a low-fat content and adapted protein content help to maintain optimal body weight
  • 100% grain-free: suitable for cats that suffer from grain-intolerance
  • Top-quality protein: 30% fresh poultry meat combined with tasty rabbit protein
  • Species-appropriate: no artificial preservatives, colourings or flavourings, refined with herbs
Wild Freedom is a species-appropriate cat food that is based on the original diet of the wild cat. These tasty, grain-free recipes are made with lots of fresh meat, enriched with wild herbs. Follow your cat's natural instincts.

You can find out more about the brand philosophy and the entire premium food range of "Wild Freedom" here.
ingredients:
Wild Freedom is a complete dry food for sterilised adult cats

Ingredients
30% fresh chicken meat, 24% chicken (dried), 10% rabbit (dried), green peas, green split peas, potato flakes, vegetable fibres, 2% chicken fat, 1% poultry liver (hydrolysed), 0.5% linseed, 0.5% brewer’s yeast (dried), yeast (hydrolysed; a natural source of mannan oligosaccharides and beta-glucans), minerals, 0.25% algae oil, 0.1% herbs (chamomile, nettle, fennel, blackberry leaves, caraway; dried)

Additives per kg
Nutritional additives: Vitamin A 20,000 IU, vitamin D3 1,750 IU, vitamin E 200 IU, taurine 1,500mg, vitamin B1 10mg, vitamin B2 8mg, vitamin B6 8mg, vitamin B12 50mcg, niacin 80mg, calcium D-pantothenate 16.5mg, folic acid 5mg, biotin 200mcg, choline chloride 2,000mg, copper (copper(II) sulphate pentahydrate) 5mg, iron (iron(II) sulphate monohydrate) 50mg, manganese (manganous sulphate monohydrate) 30mg, zinc (zinc sulphate monohydrate) 50mg, iodine (calcium iodate anhydrous) 1.5mg, selenium (sodium selenite) 0.2mg, DL-methionine (technically pure) 5,000mg

product_name: Royal Canin Appetite Control Care AirLift™ Mousse
summary:
• Wet food for cats prone to begging behavior
  • Airy, appetising mousse texture
  • Supports weight control and good satiety
  • Fewer calories to allow for larger portions
  • Easy to eat, low odour
description:
Royal Canin Appetite Control Care AirLift™ Mousse is the perfect wet food for your demanding pet prone to begging behaviour. The airy, whipped mousse ensures a particularly pleasant eating experience and makes the bowl appear fuller, so that your cat feels satisfied more quickly. Thanks to the unique texture, the food is not only readily-accepted, but is also easy to serve and mix.

With the adjusted calorie content of Royal Canin Appetite Control Care AirLift™ Mousse, you can offer your pet larger portions without increasing its energy intake too much. The cat food is low in odour and ensures a clean feeding area, while the high moisture content contributes to daily fluid intake.

Royal Canin Appetite Control Care AirLift™ Mousse at a glance:
  • Complete wet food for cats
For cats with strong begging behavior
Royal Canin Appetite Control Care AirLift™ Mousse has a special texture to help control your cat's weight while meeting its nutritional needs.
Reduces begging
The airy, whipped mousse ensures a fuller food bowl and at the same time allows larger portions thanks to an adapted energy density.
Unique texture
The delicious mousse not only provides sensory stimulation, it is also easy to eat, easy to mix and ensures clean eating.
Suitable for mixed feeding
The combination with Royal Canin Appetite Control Care dry food creates a balanced nutritional programme that brings variety to your cat's food bowl.
 
  • Whipped mousse: light and airy texture, particularly appetising
  • Reduced calorie content: adjusted energy density allows for larger portions
  • Well-satiating: proven to reduce begging behavior and facilitate weight control
  • Easy to pick up: can be easily gripped by cats' tongues, for a clean feeding area and less residue in the fur
  • Low odour: reduces unpleasant food odours in the home
  • High moisture content: contributes to sufficient fluid intake
ingredients:
Ingredients:
Meat and animal by-products, grains, oils and fats, vegetable by-products, minerals, vegetables.

Sensory additives:
Flavourings.

product_name: Eukanuba Special Care Overweight Adult
summary:
• Pienso bajo en grasas para favorecer el control del peso en perros pequeños y medianos de hasta 25 kg
  • Cn pollo como fuente de proteínas
  • Ácidos grasos omega, calcio y glucosamina
description:
Conseguir el peso ideal con una dieta es una cosa, pero mantenerlo de forma permanente es mucho más difícil. Para ayudar a tu perro a conseguirlo, existen alimentos especialmente formulados, como Eukanuba Special Care Overweight Adult. Este pienso está específicamente indiaco para ayudar a los perros pequeños y medianos a mantener su peso.

Contiene menos grasa que el pienso normal para adultos de Eukanuba. Además del delicioso pollo como fuente de proteínas, Eukanuba Special Care Overweight Adult aporta calcio, glucosamina y L-carnitina, así como valiosos ácidos grasos omega, que pueden ayudar a mantener la piel y el pelo normales. Además, las croquetas hexagonales de este pienso pueden favorecer la limpieza de los dientes durante la masticación.

Todas las características de un vistazo:

  • Pienso equilibrado para perros adultos de razas pequeñas y medianas (< 25 kg) de 1 a 7 años
  • Menos grasa: contiene un 30 % menos de grasa que el pienso para adultos de Eukanuba, por lo que puede ayudar a controlar el peso y a mantener el peso ideal.
  • Con sabroso pollo: fuente de proteínas de gran calidad que puede contribuir a la conservación de la masa muscular
  • Contiene glucosamina y L-carnitina.
  • Piel y pelo: aporta ácidos grasos omega 3 y 6 que favorecen la piel y el pelo.
  • Fuente de calcio: necesario para el mantenimiento normal de los huesos
  • Refuerzo digestivo: los prebióticos y la pulpa de remolacha pueden contribuir a una función digestiva normal.
  • Cuidado dental: croquetas hexagonales con fórmula DentaDefense para mejorar la limpieza de los dientes
  • Consumo diario: adecuado como alimento completo para la nutrición diaria de tu perro
  • Sin colorantes ni aromas artificiales
ingredients:
Composición
Pollo y pavo deshidratados (18 %, fuente natural de glucosamina y sulfato de condroitina), maíz, trigo, mijo, cebada, orujo de manzana deshidratado, pollo fresco (4 %), pulpa de remolacha deshidratada (3,7 %), harina de pescado, salsa de pollo, grasa de ave, minerales (incluido hexametafosfato sódico 0,36 %), huevo entero deshidratado, fructooligosacáridos (0,27 %), semillas de lino, aceite de pescado, levadura de cerveza deshidratada, glucosamina (de tejido animal) (0,04 %).

Aditivos
Aditivos nutricionales:
Vitamina A (48 088 UI/kg), vitamina D3 (1596 UI/kg), vitamina E (267 mg/kg), L-carnitina (49,3 mg/kg), betacaroteno (5,2 mg/kg), cobre [quelato de aminoácido de cobre(II), hidrato] (11 mg/kg), yodo [yodato de calcio, anhidro] (2,3 mg/kg), hierro [quelato aminoácido ferroso, hidrato] (60 mg/kg), manganeso [quelato aminoácido de manganeso, hidrato] (35 mg/kg), zinc [quelato aminoácido de zinc, hidrato] (100 mg/kg), selenio [selenito sódico] (0,1 mg/kg). 
Contenido en el momento de la producción.

product_name: Eukanuba Special Care Weight Control Adult Small/Medium
summary:
• Pienso reducido en grasas para perros pequeños y medianos de hasta 25 kg
  • Favorecer el control del peso
  • Pollo como fuente de proteínas
  • Ácidos grasos omega, calcio y glucosamina.
description:
Conseguir el peso ideal con una dieta es una cosa, pero mantenerlo de forma permanente es mucho más difícil. Para ayudar a tu perro a conseguirlo, existen alimentos especialmente formulados, como Eukanuba Special Care Weight Control Adult Small/Medium. Este pienso está específicamente indiaco para ayudar a los perros pequeños y medianos a mantener su peso.

Contiene menos grasa que el pienso normal para adultos de Eukanuba. Además del delicioso pollo como fuente de proteínas, Eukanuba Special Care Weight Control Adult Small/Medium aporta calcio, glucosamina y L-carnitina, así como valiosos ácidos grasos omega, que pueden ayudar a mantener la piel y el pelo normales. Además, las croquetas hexagonales de este pienso pueden favorecer la limpieza de los dientes durante la masticación.

Todas las características de un vistazo:
  • Pienso equilibrado para perros adultos de razas pequeñas y medianas (< 25 kg) de 1 a 7 años
  • Menos grasa: contiene un 30 % menos de grasa que el pienso para adultos de Eukanuba, por lo que puede ayudar a controlar el peso y a mantener el peso ideal.
  • Con sabroso pollo: fuente de proteínas de gran calidad que puede contribuir a la conservación de la masa muscular
  • Contiene glucosamina y L-carnitina.
  • Piel y pelo: aporta ácidos grasos omega 3 y 6 que favorecen la piel y el pelo.
  • Fuente de calcio: necesario para el mantenimiento normal de los huesos
  • Refuerzo digestivo: los prebióticos y la pulpa de remolacha pueden contribuir a una función digestiva normal.
  • Cuidado dental: croquetas hexagonales con fórmula DentaDefense para mejorar la limpieza de los dientes
  • Consumo diario: adecuado como alimento completo para la nutrición diaria de tu perro
  • Sin colorantes ni aromas artificiales

product_name: Eukanuba Special Care Weight Control Adult Large
summary:
• Pienso bajo en grasas para perros de razas grandes (25-40 kg) y muy grandes (> 40 kg)
  • Ayuda a controlar el peso
  • Pollo rico en proteínas para mantener los músculos,
  • Con calcio y glucosamina
description:
Si tu perro tiende a ganar kilos de más, puede ser conveniente recurrir a un alimento especial con un contenido energético y nutritivo adaptado a sus necesidades. Eukanuba Special Care Weight Control Adult Large está diseñado para perros adultos de razas grandes y muy grandes, y puede ayudar a mantener el peso ideal gracias a su composición baja en grasas.

Este pienso contiene sabroso pollo, que proporciona a tu peludo proteínas de excelente calidad. También tiene calcio para los huesos, glucosamina, un componente de la masa cartilaginosa, y L-carnitina. Además, Eukanuba Special Care Weight Control Adult Large incluye una mezcla de fibras alimentarias que puede ayudar a favorecer una digestión óptima. Este pienso está compuesto por croquetas hexagonales con la fórmula DentaDefense, que puede contribuir a la limpieza dental.

Todas las características de un vistazo:
 
  • Pienso para perros adultos de razas grandes (25-40 kg) de 1,5 a 6 años y muy grandes (> 40 kg) de 2 a 5 años
  • Control de peso: con un 30 % menos de grasa que el pienso normal Eukanuba Adult, puede ayudar a controlar el peso y a mantener el peso ideal.
  • Elaborado con pollo: fuente de proteínas de gran calidad, importantes para el mantenimiento de la masa muscular
  • Fuente de glucosamina: un componente natural de la masa cartilaginosa
  • Con ácidos grasos omega 3 y 6: puede contribuir a la salud normal de la piel y el pelo.
  • Prebióticos y pulpa de remolacha: pueden favorecer la función digestiva normal.
  • Con calcio: necesario para el mantenimiento normal de los huesos
  • Croquetas DentaDefense: forma hexagonal especial que ayuda al cuidado dental
  • 100 % sano y equilibrado: ideal para la alimentación diaria de perros grandes
  • Sin colorantes ni aromas artificiales
  • Contiene L-carnitina.
ingredients:
Composición
Maíz, pollo y pavo deshidratados (15 %, fuente natural de glucosamina y sulfato de condroitina), cebada, mijo, trigo, pollo fresco (10 %), pulpa de remolacha deshidratada (3,1 %), harina de pescado, grasa de ave, salsa de pollo, minerales (incluido hexametafosfato de sodio 0,36 %), huevo entero deshidratado, linaza, fructo-oligosacáridos (0,26 %), levadura de cerveza deshidratada, glucosamina (de tejido animal) (0,04 %)

description:

Eukanuba Special Care Sensitive Joints Adult contiene fibras alimentarias y prebióticos, que pueden ayudar a la digestión. product_name: Eukanuba Special Care Sensitive Skin Adult
summary:
• Pienso hipoalergénico para perros adultos (> 1 año) con piel sensible
  • Pescado como fuente única de proteínas
  • Ácidos grasos omega para el cuidado de la piel y el pelo
  • Croquetas para la salud dental
description:
A veces, menos es más: con una lista de ingredientes reducida, Eukanuba Special Care Sensitive Skin Adult es una excelente opción si quieres tener bajo control lo que come tu perro. Este pienso cuenta con una receta hipoalergénica y contiene una sola fuente de proteína animal: sabroso pescado.

Este alimento no solo le proporciona proteínas de excelente calidad, sino también valiosos ácidos grasos omega 3 y 6, que pueden contribuir al mantenimiento normal de la piel y el pelo. Además, Eukanuba Special Care Sensitive Skin Adult contiene una mezcla adecuada de fibras alimentarias que pueden mejorar la digestión. Un plus: el sistema especial DentaDefense de las croquetas con forma especial puede ayudar a limpiar los dientes.

Todas las características de un vistazo:
 
  • Pienso equilibrado para perros adultos de todas las razas a partir de 1 año
  • Ideal para perros con piel sensible propensa al picor y las irritaciones
  • Una sola proteína animal: elaborado con una sola fuente de proteína animal (pescado)
  • Hipoalergénico: lista de ingredientes reducida que puede disminuir el riesgo de intolerancias
  • Cuidado de la piel y el pelo: contiene valiosos ácidos grasos omega 3 y 6.
  • Con prebióticos: la mezcla equilibrada de fibras alimentarias con prebióticos y pulpa de remolacha puede ayudar a la digestión.
  • 100 % equilibrado: composición saludable, ideal para la nutrición diaria de tu perro
  • Limpieza de dientes: sistema DentaDefense, con croquetas con forma especial para mejorar la higiene de los dientes
ingredients:
Composición
Maíz, harina de pescado (22 %), grasa de cerdo, pulpa de remolacha deshidratada (2,9 %), salsa de pescado, minerales (incluido hexametafosfato sódico 0,38 %), fructooligosacáridos (0,28 %), levadura de cerveza deshidratada.

Aditivos
Aditivos nutricionales:
Vitamina A (46 801 UI/kg), vitamina D3 (1553 UI/kg), vitamina E (260 mg/kg), betacaroteno (5,1 mg/kg), cobre [quelato aminoácido de cobre(II), hidrato] (13 mg/kg), yodo [yodato de calcio, anhidro] (2,6 mg/kg), hierro [quelato aminoácido ferroso, hidrato] (69 mg/kg), manganeso [quelato aminoácido de manganeso, hidrato] (40 mg/kg), zinc [quelato aminoácido de zinc, hidrato] (115 mg/kg).
Contenido en el momento de la producción.

product_name: Eukanuba Special Care Sensitive Digestion Adult
summary:
• Pienso para perros adultos (> 1 año) de cualquier raza con estómago sensible
  • Fuente de ácidos grasos omega, prebióticos, calcio y proteínas de alta calidad
  • DentaDefense para el cuidado dental
description:
Fácil de digerir, sano y sabroso: Eukanuba Special Care Sensitive Digestion Adult es un pienso equilibrado y muy fácil de digerir, adecuado para perros adultos de todas las razas.

Contiene pollo, una fuente de proteínas de gran calidad que se digiere muy bien, y arroz, una fuente digerible de hidratos de carbono. Eukanuba Special Care Sensitive Digestion Adult también ofrece a tu perro una mezcla de fibras alimentarias y prebióticos, que pueden ayudar a mejorar la función digestiva. Además, los ácidos grasos omega 3 y 6 de origen natural pueden contribuir al mantenimiento normal de la piel y el pelo.

Todas las características de un vistazo:
  • Pienso de gran calidad para perros adultos de todas las razas a partir de 1 año
  • Ideal para perros con estómago sensible
  • Rico en pollo: fuente de proteínas animales de alta calidad, fácil de digerir
  • Con arroz: fuente de hidratos de carbono de fácil digestión
  • Refuerzo digestivo: mezcla de prebióticos (fructo-oligosacáridos y manano-oligosacáridos), butirato y pulpa de remolacha para reforzar la función digestiva
  • Consumo diario: 100 % sano y equilibrado, apto como alimento completo
  • Con valiosos ácidos grasos omega: contiene fuentes naturales de omega 3 y omega 6, que pueden favorecer el mantenimiento normal de la piel y el pelo.
  • Contiene calcio: necesario para el mantenimiento normal de los huesos
  • Sistema DentaDefense: croquetas con forma hexagonal especial para mejorar la limpieza de los dientes
ingredients:
Composición
Pollo y pavo deshidratados (21 % incluyendo,13 % pollo), arroz (21 %), maíz, mijo, grasa de cerdo, pollo fresco (4 %), pulpa de remolacha deshidratada (3,3%), minerales (incluyendo hexametafosfato de sodio 0,38 %), harina de pescado, salsa de pollo, huevo entero deshidratado, fructooligosacáridos (0,4 %), mananooligosacáridos (0,14 %), levadura de cerveza deshidratada, butirato de sodio microencapsulado (0,1 %), semillas de lino.

Vitamina A (47 877 UI/kg), vitamina D3 (1589 UI/kg), vitamina E (266 mg/kg), betacaroteno (5,2 mg/kg), cobre [quelato aminoácido de cobre (II) hidratado] (11 mg/kg), yodo [yodato de calcio, anhidro] (2,3 mg/kg), hierro [quelato aminoácido ferroso (II), hidrato] (61 mg/kg), manganeso [quelato aminoácido de manganeso, hidrato] (35 mg/kg), zinc [quelato aminoácido de zinc, hidrato] (101 mg/kg), selenio [selenito sódico] (0,09 mg/kg).
